sentences.arabic: أُنْهِي عَمَلِي فِي السَّاعَةِ الْخَامِسَةِ مَسَاءً.
sentences.translation: Završavam svoj posao u pet sati popodne.
sentences.translationEn: I finish my work at five o'clock in the evening.

sentences.arabic: بَعْدَ ذَلِكَ، أَقْضِي وَقْتًا مَعَ عَائِلَتِي وَأُمَارِسُ الرِّيَاضَةَ.
sentences.translation: Nakon toga, provodim vrijeme sa svojom porodicom i vježbam.
sentences.translationEn: After that, I spend time with my family and exercise.

sentences.arabic: هَذَا التَّوَازُنُ يُسَاعِدُنِي عَلَى الْبَقَاءِ بِصِحَّةٍ وَسَعَادَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Ova ravnoteža mi pomaže da ostanem zdrav i sretan.
sentences.translationEn: This balance helps me stay healthy and happy.
